message:
test(raptorq): constraint matrix, proof trace, perf invariant tests (bd-lefk)

Add tests/raptorq_perf_invariants.rs covering gaps in RaptorQ test suite:
- Constraint matrix structural properties (LDPC/HDPC nontriviality, dimensions, degree)
- Repair equation determinism, ESI independence, call-order independence
- Decode statistics bounds (peeled+inactivated ≤ L, pivots ≤ inactivated)
- Proof trace correctness (peeling.solved matches stats, replay verification)
- Overhead sensitivity (exact L symbols, extra repair overhead)
- 50-seed structured sweep with stats logging for regression triage
- Dense decode regime (75% loss Gaussian path, all-repair with proof)
- Failure mode determinism (InsufficientSymbols, SymbolSizeMismatch)
- Cross-parameter roundtrip sweep (8 K/symbol_size combos)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
